case_title: AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL VS CZECH PETER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES (SF1) AS TO DEFENDANT CZECH PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES (SF1) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CZECH PETER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,531.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
